# MCP Weather Server Current Weather Test
# Tests the get_current_weather tool functionality
# Note: These tests simulate API calls and may require mocking for CI

# Build the weather server binary
go build -o mcp-weather-server .

# Set API key for tests
env OPENWEATHER_API_KEY=test_api_key_123

# Test current weather for London (without specifying units - should default to metric)
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"London"}},"id":2}
EOF

# Since this will likely fail with invalid API key, we expect an error response
stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test current weather with metric units explicitly
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Paris","units":"metric"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test current weather with imperial units
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"New York","units":"imperial"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test current weather with kelvin units
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Tokyo","units":"kelvin"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test current weather with city,country format
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Berlin,DE"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test with a comprehensive location name
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"San Francisco,US"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test with international location
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Mumbai,IN"}},"id":2}
EOF

stdout '"isError":true'
stdout 'Error getting current weather'

# Test multiple weather requests in sequence
exec mcp-weather-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"London"}},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Paris"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_current_weather","arguments":{"location":"Rome"}},"id":4}
EOF

# All should fail with test API key
stdout '"isError":true'
